<!-- GENERATED by cmd/gendocs from internal/checks/registry.go. Do not edit by hand; run `make docs-gen`. -->

## Rule ID

`kind: filesystem_filename_matches_slug`

## Purpose

Require a frontmatter field to match the markdown file basename.

## Configuration keys

| Field | Required | Default | Meaning |
|---|---|---|---|
| `field` | no | `slug` | Frontmatter key compared to the basename. |

## Example

```yaml
collections:
  notes:
    path: notes
    checks:
      - kind: filesystem_filename_matches_slug
        field: slug
```
